entities.name: tenants
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/update/delete by tenant_id or tenant_key in D1

entities.name: tenant_branding
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id foreign key and all indexes start from tenant_id where tenant scoped
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/update/delete by tenant_id and brand_key in D1

entities.name: tenant_branding_audit_events
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id foreign key and tenant-scoped audit index

secretPolicy: No raw secrets, DNS tokens, CDN credentials or customer data are stored in migrations, seeds or fixtures.
acceptanceEvidenceRequired: GitHub Actions plus Cloudflare D1-backed migration/test run before moving this cycle to concluido.
